channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Arnold, Robinson run for more than 100 yards as Oklahoma stuns No. 7 Alabama 24-3
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Xavier Robinson ran for career highs of 107 yards and two touchdowns, and Oklahoma stunned No. 7 Alabama 24-3 on Saturday night to become bowl eligible and deal a severe blow to the Crimson Tide's chances of receiving a College Football Playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Penguins' Crosby scores 600th NHL goal
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Sidney Crosby would’ve liked his 600th NHL goal to come in a win Crosby became the 21sth player to reach the mark when scored in the second period of the Pittsburgh Penguins' 6-1 loss to the Utah Hockey Club on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: San Jose State volleyball gets first-round bye at MW Tournament; Spartans scheduled to open against team that refused to play them in regular season
item.description: The Spartans are set to face either Utah State or Boise State in the second round, are waiting to see if a Colorado judge will allow alleged transgender athlete to play.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Same glitz and glamour for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, and perhaps another Verstappen championship
item.description: Max Verstappen returned to the Las Vegas Grand Prix as the defending winner of the Sin City spectacle and a fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship well within his reach.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rutgers' Greg Schiano defends timeout that led to shocking Hail Mary loss on Senior Day
item.description: Rutgers head coach Greg Schiano called a timeout that gave Illinois a chance to see how tough a field goal would have been, allowing the Illinois offense to win the game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man City routed 4-0 by Tottenham in fifth-straight defeat as crisis deepens for Pep Guardiola
item.description: What started as an evening of celebration for Manchester City ended with the four-time defending Premier League champion falling to a fifth-straight loss in all competitions and facing a deepening crisis in a season that is threatening to unravel.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jai'Den Thomas leads No. 23 UNLV to a 27-16 victory over San Jose State
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Jai'Den Thomas ran for 135 yards and the go-ahead touchdown in the third quarter to help No. 23 UNLV keep its conference title hopes alive with a 27-16 victory over San Jose State on Friday night. The Rebels (9-2, 5-1 Mountain West, No.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chargers' Week 16 matchup becomes first ever NFL game flexed to a Thursday. Some fans aren't happy
item.description: The Los Angeles Chargers are surging at the moment, and the NFL is beginning to take notice. For the first time ever, the NFL has moved a game up three days from Sunday to a Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Local fighter wins WBC Muy Thai world title
item.description: Selina Flores, 26, recently won the WBC Muy Thai world title, making history as the third American woman to ever do so.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026; new ballpark deal dies: Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: LeBron James announces he's leaving social media
item.description: LeBron James is taking a break from social media, citing negativity online. The Lakers star posted a screengrab of a post from Rich Kleiman, Kevin Durant's longtime agent, to X, formerly Twitter.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KTLA 5

item.title: Alex Killorn helps the Ducks beat the Blackhawks 3-2 for their third straight win
item.description: Alex Killorn had a goal and an assist in the third period, and the Anaheim Ducks beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Tuesday night for their season-high third straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Column: Once Eberflus is gone, it's time to find a true culture setter
item.description: The Chicago Bears have lost three games in a row despite having a positive turnover margin, and need a head coach who can galvanize his roster to eat a punch early and rise to the occasion when the game is on the line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears show moxie against Packers, fall short for 4th straight week as Santos FG is blocked as time expires
item.description: The Chicago Bears lost to the Green Bay Packers 20-19, setting a new record for the longest win streak in the historic rivalry, breaking a tie with a 10-game win streak from 1994 to 1998.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
